summary.zh: 在长度接近的短文本之间进行平滑替换，保留阅读位置。
summary.en: Transition between similarly sized short labels while preserving reading position.

definition.zh: 文字变化时逐字符播放动画，把注意力引向新值。
definition.en: Characters or glyph shapes transition between text states to focus attention on updated content.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在长度接近的短文本值之间平滑替换，并把注意力引向变化内容。
purpose.en: Transition smoothly between similarly sized short text values and direct attention to the change.

frequency.zh: 适合低到中频指标、状态词和短标签；正文段落直接替换。
frequency.en: Use for low- to medium-frequency metrics, status words, and short labels, replacing body paragraphs directly.

trigger.zh: 由值变化触发，只动画发生变化的字符或词组。
trigger.en: Trigger on value change and animate only the characters or phrase that changed.

enterExit.zh: 旧字形弱化并让位，新字形在同一基线出现；容器宽度保持可预测。
enterExit.en: Soften and replace old glyphs as new glyphs appear on the same baseline, keeping container width predictable.

interruptibility.zh: 快速更新时合并中间值，只向最新文本收敛。
interruptibility.en: Coalesce rapid updates and settle only on the latest text.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；实时值提供 aria-live 策略，避免逐字符播报。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; use an aria-live strategy that avoids character-by-character announcements.

reducedMotion.zh: 立即替换完整文本，使用静态高亮或一次短淡入提示变化。
reducedMotion.en: Replace the full text immediately and use static highlighting or one short fade to signal change.

reviewNotes.zh: 测试不同字数、CJK 字符和换行边界。
reviewNotes.en: Test varying lengths, CJK characters, and wrapping boundaries.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保屏幕阅读器只接收最终值。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure screen readers receive only the final value.
